generation_prompt: Create a production-ready input component with the following characteristics: Name: text-input Description: text-input is a text input UI component from the pinesui corpus. Style: rounded, utility-styled Interactions: keyboard-focus Tags: input, pinesui, text Requirements: - Works in React with TypeScript by default but adaptable to Vue, Svelte, or plain HTML/CSS - Uses Tailwind CSS for styling - Fully accessible with ARIA labels and keyboard navigation - Responsive and mobile-friendly - No external dependencies beyond React and Tailwind unless necessary - Include all necessary imports - Export as default with sensible prop types Generate clean production-ready code only.
